channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Senate Republicans seek major changes to House-passed Trump budget bill
item.description: Senate Republicans are staring down a major fight to overhaul the House's budget resolution as lawmakers eye big changes. Speaker Mike Johnson (R-La.), with the help of President Trump’s muscle, was able to get the House's plan to enact Trump's sweeping legislative agenda past a key hurdle Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Al Weaver, NewsNation

item.title: HUD terminates Obama-era housing rule that Trump warned would 'destroy' home values
item.description: The Trump administration rescinded the Affirmatively Furthering Fair Housing (AFFH) rule, which mandated that localities commission extensive analyses to certify that new housing developments do not exacerbate disparities among federally protected groups.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: EU pushes back hard against Trump tariff threats and his caustic comments that bloc is out to get US
item.description: BRUSSELS (AP) — The European Union on Thursday pushed back hard against allegations by U.S. President Donald Trump that the 27-nation bloc was out to get the United States, and warned that it would vigorously fight any wholesale tariff of 25% on all EU products.
item.dc:creator: RAF CASERT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Senate committee recommends Lori Chavez-DeRemer's confirmation as Trump's labor secretary
item.description: A Senate committee has advanced the nomination of President Donald Trump’s choice to head the Department of Labor.
item.dc:creator: Cathy Bussewitz, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Israeli Finance Minister Smotrich will meet with Treasury Secretary Bessent in Washington
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Israeli Finance Minister Bezalel Smotrich will head to Washington in the coming days to meet with U.S. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent and discuss economic and political cooperation, Smotrich's spokesperson said Thursday.
item.dc:creator: JULIA FRANKEL and FATIMA HUSSEIN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump plans tariffs on Mexico and Canada for Tuesday, while doubling existing 10% tariffs on China
item.description: Mexican President Claudia Sheinbaum says she hopes to speak with U.S. President Donald Trump now that he has announced plans to impose tariffs on Mexico and Canada starting Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: House DOGE subcommittee chair Greene threatens criminal referrals over foreign aid spending
item.description: House DOGE subcommittee Chair Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene, R-Ga., said she was considering investigations and criminal referrals over foreign aid spending.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Republican Heather Hill, Appalachian entrepreneur, is inspired by tragedies to run for Ohio governor
item.description: COLUMBUS, Ohio (AP) — Thoughts of her two foster children shot and killed by police still wake Heather Hill from her sleep once or twice a week. The Republican entrepreneur from Appalachia says those nightmares, which at times leave her sobbing, helped propel her into Ohio's 2026 governor's race.
item.dc:creator: JULIE CARR SMYTH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump's firing of military brass prompts concern but little pushback from Republicans
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — When the Senate unanimously confirmed Gen. CQ Brown Jr. as Air Force chief of staff in 2020, President Donald Trump hailed a “historic day for America!” on social media and said he was ”Excited to work even more closely with Gen.
item.dc:creator: MATT BROWN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Musk says federal workers should expect another round of ‘pulse check’ emails
item.description: President Trump warned federal workers who did not reply to recent emails asking them to describe “five things” they accomplished are “on the bubble” suggesting they are at risk of losing their jobs.
item.dc:creator: Heidi Glenn, MPR News

item.title: The National Archives is nonpartisan but has found itself targeted by Trump
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — As President Donald Trump moves to overhaul the federal government with astonishing speed, he has wreaked havoc on one agency long known for its nonpartisanship and revered for its mission: the National Archives and Records Administration.
item.dc:creator: ALI SWENSON and GARY FIELDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump says he will offer 'gold cards' for $5 million path to citizenship, replacing investor visas
item.description: President Donald Trump said that he plans to offer a “gold card” visa with a path to citizenship for $5 million, replacing a 35-year-old visa for investors.
item.dc:creator: ELLIOT SPAGAT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: DOGE subcommittee looks at US foreign aid spending
item.description: Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene said the hearing comes as Americans are "shocked" to discover how their taxpayer dollars have been spent overseas.
item.dc:creator: Tom Dempsey, NewsNation

item.title: Trump pitches 'gold card' as replacement for EB5 investor visa
item.description: “We're going to be selling a gold card. You have a green card. This is a gold card. We're going to be putting a price on that card of about $5 million and that's going to give you green card privileges,” Trump said.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Beitsch, NewsNation

item.title: Zelensky expected to visit White House amid push for minerals deal
item.description: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky is expected to visit the White House on Friday as Kyiv and the Trump administration work to finalize an agreement on critical minerals.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Student loan borrowers face abrupt change as GOP budget plans threaten to raise payments
item.description: Student loan borrowers could see their payments increase under budget plans currently under discussion by House Republicans, a violent about-face after years of working with the Biden administration to lower payments and secure debt relief.
item.dc:creator: Lexi Lonas Cochran, Fox 5

item.title: As time change nears, Nevada considers opting out of daylight saving
item.description: Don't have a heart attack, but daylight saving time is less than two weeks away. If a Nevada lawmaker has her way, it will be the last time the state "springs ahead.
item.dc:creator: Greg Haas, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Watch: Trump, Macron hold White House press conference
item.description: President Donald Trump hosts French President Emmanuel Macron on Monday, the first visit by a European leader to the White House since Trump returned.
item.dc:creator: The Hill, Fox 5

item.title: Cortez Masto, Rosen introduce proposal to block Trump plan to end birthright citizenship
item.description: Nevada Democratic Sens. Catherine Cortez Masto and Jacky Rosen introduced a proposal Thursday to block President Donald Trump's attempt to end the constitutional right to birthright citizenship.
item.dc:creator: David Charns, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Former NFL player Chris Kluwe arrested while protesting MAGA sign at city council meeting
item.description: Former NFL punter Chris Kluwe was detained at a city council meeting in California on Tuesday after delivering an impassioned speech criticizing the design of a plaque to be installed at the Huntington Beach Central Library.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, Fox 5
